hceadd364gc5a6g4950ga158g8782020c6342: When we set out on this little adventure, I never imagined I'd watch you slaughter an ancient order of druids.
h6c8bac20g7e67g4007ga700g35668fc8af77: It's a lot of bloodshed. I'm almost impressed.
h23070201g6cd5g43a6gac34g02760bcd06f5: Don't be. I didn't want to kill anyone.
h144c3e01g7433g492bgb743g04896b7845a2: Perhaps not, but you did it anyway. All the more impressive, really.
hc15ae73cg9463g4e99g98e3gae9040948a15: The druids made their choice. I made mine.
h3290fc59g46c8g47b5g8334g5e42c7624bd6: You certainly did. I'm glad I'm on the right team.
hd0c02be9gc97bg49ccgaf33gda48647ba8d3: Almost? How many corpses does it take to impress you?
